title: wolftpm crates missing rust-version; core::error::Error requires Rust 1.81
description: wolftpm/src/error.rs uses 'impl core::error::Error for Error {}' and wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs uses 'impl std::error::Error for Error {}'. The core::error::Error trait was stabilized in Rust 1.81. Neither wolftpm/Cargo.toml nor wolftpm-tss/Cargo.toml declares rust-version, so there is no documented MSRV and no CI check that would catch a regression. If anyone builds this on a toolchain older than 1.81, they get a compile error. Trigger: cargo +1.79 build -p wolftpm.
